transformed_instruction:
PIPELINE: TEXT_MANIPULATION

Format the exploratory objectives and endpoints from the Synopsis into a table with the following structure:

| Objective(s) | Endpoint(s) |
| :---- | :---- |
|  |  |
|  |  |
|  |  |

- Copy all exploratory objectives and their corresponding endpoints from the Synopsis
- Include only exploratory objectives in this table
- Exclude primary and secondary objectives (scoped to other sections)
- If no exploratory objectives are specified in the Synopsis, leave the table rows empty
reasoning: The input instruction contains only an empty table template with three rows for objectives and endpoints. Since this is section 2.3 specifically for exploratory objectives and endpoints, I transformed this into a directive to populate the table with exploratory objectives from the Synopsis (the primary source). I specified TEXT_MANIPULATION pipeline because the task involves copying content from a source document into a predefined table format. I added explicit scoping to exclude primary and secondary objectives since those are covered in sections 2.1 and 2.2. I preserved the exact table structure from the input including the column headers and formatting. I added a conditional instruction to handle cases where no exploratory objectives exist in the source document, maintaining the empty rows as shown in the template.
